message.content:
__Invites not counting?__

**On desktop**
- 📋   Press server title  ➜ Invite People ➜ Press "Copy Link"  :right_arrow:   Invite your friends! 
**On mobile**
- 📋  Press a channel  ➜  Then the name ➜ Press "invite members" ➜ Press Copy link :right_arrow:  Invite your friends!

<a:VERIFY:1154289883255423036>    Please be patient to get your role as we **might be asleep or afk you will get your role just wait.**

**Unfollowing the twitter will result in a ban, we check daily. <a:BananaParty:1048431943571751033> 

Use code fruss in the item shop EVERY 2 weeks to keep ACCESS for the Drop Maps.  <a:BananaParty:1048431943571751033>  **
It’ll be my pleasure if you stay cool and calm with me,due to I’m here for a reasonable purpose which a lot of people have benefited from it and I’ll be so happy if you can ask me my purpose on here.
